---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Projects
:::

Research tools, open-source work, and things built along the way. Some are live; others are works in progress.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: project-grid

::: project-card
[In progress]{.project-status .status-wip}

### Academic website template

A free Quarto-based academic website template deployed to GitHub Pages. Includes live ORCID publications, a reading list, contact form, and full setup guide — no coding experience required.

::: project-tags
[Quarto]{.project-tag} [GitHub Pages]{.project-tag} [Open source]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[View template](https://connorconkeymorrison.com/template){.project-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/ccicm/academic-website-template){.project-link-secondary}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### EBSA measurement tool

A placeholder for future project content.

::: project-tags
[Research]{.project-tag} [Measurement]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
Interested in collaborating on any of these? [Get in touch →](../contact.html){.about-link}
:::
